sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { FaArrowLeft, FaTicketAlt, FaClock, FaFilm, FaUser } from 'react-icons/fa';

const UserDashboard = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();

    return ( <
        div className = "min-h-screen bg-gray-900" >
        <
        div className = "bg-black p-4" >
        <
        div className = "container mx-auto flex justify-between items-center" >
        <
        button onClick = {
            () => navigate('/') }
        className = "text-white" >
        <
        FaArrowLeft className = "inline mr-2" / > Back <
        /button> <
        h1 className = "text-white text-xl" > User Dashboard < /h1> <
        div className = "w-8" > < /div> <
        /div> <
        /div>

        <
        div className = "container mx-auto px-4 py-8" >
        <
        div className = "bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-8" >
        <
        div className = "flex items-center space-x-4" >
        <
        div className = "bg-red-600 p-4 rounded-full" >
        <
        FaUser className = "text-white text-2xl" / >
        <
        /div> <
        div >
        <
        h2 className = "text-white text-2xl" > Welcome, Rajesh Kumar < /h2> <
        p className = "text-gray-400" > rajesh @example.com < /p> <
        /div> <
        /div> <
        /div>

        <
        div className = "grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6" >
        <
        div className = "bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6" >
        <
        h3 className = "text-white text-xl mb-4" > Current Bookings < /h3> <
        div className = "border border-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4 mb-4" >
        <
        div className = "flex justify-between" >
        <
        div >
        <
        h4 className = "text-white font-semibold" > Animal < /h4> <
        p className = "text-gray-400 text-sm" > Today, 7: 00 PM < /p> <
        p className = "text-gray-400 text-sm" > PVR Cinemas, Andheri < /p> <
        p className = "text-gray-400 text-sm" > Seats: D12, D13 < /p> <
        /div> <
        div className = "text-right" >
        <
        p className = "text-green-500" > Confirmed < /p> <
        p className = "text-white" > ₹350 < /p> <
        /div> <
        /div> <
        /div> <
        /div>

        <
        div className = "bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6" >
        <
        h3 className = "text-white text-xl mb-4" > Quick Actions < /h3> <
        button className = "w-full bg-red-600 text-white py-3 rounded-lg mb-3" >
        Book New Ticket <
        /button> <
        button className = "w-full bg-gray-700 text-white py-3 rounded-lg" >
        View Booking History <
        /button> <
        /div> <
        /div> <
        /div> <
        /div>
    );
};

export default UserDashboard;
